onboarding.slide1.title: What Is Cafa AI?
onboarding.slide1.body: Cafa AI is a mobile AI assistant for everyday work and life. You can use it for questions, writing, planning, and creative tasks from one chat. Instead of switching between apps and search results, you get a clear starting point in seconds.
onboarding.slide2.title: How It Works
onboarding.slide2.body: Cafa AI works like a conversation, not a traditional search engine. Type a question or describe what you need, and it responds in plain language. You can then ask it to summarize, rewrite, expand, or format the result for your exact use case.
onboarding.slide3.title: Everyday Quick Answers
onboarding.slide3.body: Use Cafa AI for fast, practical help throughout the day. Ask about general topics, compare options, or get help making plans. For example, you can create a travel budget draft and quickly adjust flights, food, and daily spending.
onboarding.slide4.title: Follow-Up Friendly
onboarding.slide4.body: You do not need to restart from scratch after each reply. Keep refining in the same conversation with follow-up prompts. Ask for a shorter version, a different tone, more detail, or a polished final draft you can send or publish.
onboarding.slide5.title: Chat Memory
onboarding.slide5.body: Cafa AI keeps context within each conversation to make multi-step tasks easier. It remembers what you were discussing so your follow-ups stay relevant. That helps when you are solving one task across multiple rounds or returning later.
onboarding.slide6.title: Images and Videos
onboarding.slide6.body: Beyond text, you can create visual content inside the app. Generate images for ideas, campaigns, or social posts, and create short video concepts quickly. It is a simple way to explore visuals without heavy editing software.
onboarding.slide7.title: Understand Documents
onboarding.slide7.body: Upload documents and ask direct questions about the content. Cafa AI can summarize key points, explain complex sections in simpler terms, and surface important details faster. This is useful for class notes, reports, proposals, and prep before meetings.
onboarding.slide8.title: Export Useful Outputs
onboarding.slide8.body: Turn raw information into practical outputs you can share. Cafa AI can help produce chart-ready summaries, PDF-style notes, spreadsheet structures, and presentation outlines. It is useful for school projects, business updates, and personal planning.
onboarding.slide9.title: Real-Time Help
onboarding.slide9.body: Cafa AI can also help with timely information when topics change quickly. Use it for weather checks, quick updates, and live-context questions. For high-stakes topics like health, money, law, safety, or travel, always verify critical details before acting.

chat.welcome: Hi, I am Cafa AI. Ask me anything or start with a task.
tools.subtitle: Create, transform, and refine with focused workspaces designed for media and writing tasks.
tools.card.avatar.title: Avatar Video
tools.card.avatar.description: Create a talking avatar video with gallery faces or your own portrait, auto-written script, and voice selection.
tools.card.imageToVideo.title: Image to Video
tools.card.imageToVideo.description: Turn a still image into a motion-ready clip with a workflow tuned for video prompts.
tools.card.editImage.title: Edit Image
tools.card.editImage.description: Refine, restyle, or transform an image without leaving the Cafa creative flow.
tools.card.writing.title: Writing Tools
tools.card.writing.description: Open AI Detection and Humanize in one place for fast checks and cleaner rewrites.
tools.card.voice.title: Text to Speech
tools.card.voice.description: Turn text into downloadable speech with library voices, cloned voices, previews, and recent history.
repo.subtitle: Everything you have generated lives here, grouped into focused collections for easier browsing.
repo.card.artifacts.title: Artifacts
repo.card.artifacts.description: Browse generated files, exports, and document outputs in one organized repository view.
repo.card.videos.title: Videos
repo.card.videos.description: Review saved video generations, manage downloads, and revisit recent motion outputs.
repo.card.images.title: Images
repo.card.images.description: Open your image history, inspect results, and manage saved visual generations quickly.

chat.starterPrompts: Plan a productive day for me in 30-minute blocks.
Rewrite this message to sound confident but friendly.
Give me a 10-minute workout with no equipment.
Summarize this topic like I am a beginner.
Create a weekly meal plan on a budget.
Help me brainstorm 20 business name ideas.
Turn my notes into a polished email.
Explain this concept using a real-life analogy.
Give me a step-by-step study plan for this week.
Draft a professional follow-up message after an interview.
Suggest a simple evening routine for better sleep.
Create a packing checklist for a 5-day trip.
Help me set SMART goals for this month.
Write a short social post about my new project.
Generate 5 hooks for a YouTube video idea.
Turn this rough outline into a presentation structure.
Help me practice for a difficult conversation.
Create a beginner-friendly budget tracker template.
Suggest 10 healthy snacks I can prep quickly.
Rewrite this paragraph to be more concise.
Give me a one-week plan to improve my speaking skills.
Help me break this big task into smaller steps.
Create a checklist for launching a side project.
Teach me the basics of investing in plain language.
Write a polite way to decline a request.
Generate interview questions for this role.
Help me choose between two options with pros and cons.
Create a travel itinerary for a weekend city trip.
Give me a quick daily journal template.
Make this resume bullet stronger and measurable.
Suggest a simple skincare routine for busy mornings.
Help me prepare talking points for a team meeting.
Create a content calendar for 2 weeks.
Give me 15 creative ideas for Instagram reels.
Turn this long text into key bullet points.
Help me write a clear project status update.
Create a study guide from this chapter summary.
Suggest ways to reduce screen time at night.
Draft a kind apology message that sounds sincere.
Give me a minimalist morning routine.
Help me create a portfolio project idea.
Write a short product description for this item.
Plan a no-stress weekend reset routine.
Suggest 10 prompts for practicing English conversation.
Create a simple habit tracker I can use daily.
Help me improve this caption for higher engagement.
Give me questions to ask before accepting a job offer.
Turn this goal into a 7-day action plan.
Create a structured plan to learn a new skill fast.
Help me write a clear and respectful boundary message.

media.imageToVideo.welcome: This section is for generating a video based on an image. Upload an image, then describe the motion, camera movement, or scene you want.
media.imageToVideo.placeholder: Describe the motion, camera movement, or scene you want...
media.editImage.welcome: This section is for editing an image. Upload an image, then describe the changes, style updates, or fixes you want.
media.editImage.placeholder: Describe the changes, style updates, or fixes you want...
media.upload.imageMenuAnnouncement: Upload menu opened. Choose image upload.
media.upload.label: Upload
media.upload.imageHint: Opens your photo library to select an image.
cafaLive.voice.closeHint: Returns to the Cafa Live screen.
cafaLive.voice.chooseBody: Pick the voice Cafa AI will use before you start your live session.
cafaLive.voice.availableHint: Browse the voices, preview them, and choose the one you want.
cafaLive.voice.selectHint: Selects this voice for your next live session.
cafaLive.settings.title: Settings
cafaLive.settings.subtitle: Voice setup and session preferences for Cafa Live.
cafaLive.settings.voiceSetupBody: Pick a voice before you start so your live session feels right from the first reply.
cafaLive.settings.openVoiceList: Open the voice list to preview the available options before you begin.
cafaLive.history.title: Recent conversation
cafaLive.history.subtitle: Review your latest saved Cafa Live turns.
cafaLive.history.refreshHint: Fetches the latest saved turns from the server.
cafaLive.history.emptyBody: Start your first Cafa Live session and your latest turns will appear here automatically.
images.deleteMessage: This image will be permanently removed from your saved history.
images.deleteAllMessage: This will permanently remove all saved images from your history.
videos.deleteMessage: This video will be permanently removed from your saved history.
videos.deleteAllMessage: This will permanently remove all saved videos from your history.
images.photosPermissionMessage: Allow Photos access in Settings to save images and videos.
videos.photosPermissionMessage: Allow Photos access in Settings to save images and videos.
cafaLive.settings.openVoicePickerHint: Browse and choose a different voice for your session.
cafaLive.settings.selectedPreviewHint: Plays a short sample of the selected voice.
cafaLive.settings.chooseVoiceHint: Choose the voice Cafa AI will use for your live session.
cafaLive.end.title: End Cafa Live session?
cafaLive.end.message: This will disconnect the live voice room. You can start a fresh session any time.
cafaLive.history.loadHint: Loads the most recent Cafa Live turns saved on the server.
cafaLive.history.openHint: Shows your recent Cafa Live conversation history.
settings.data.tiktokMeasurementBody: Share registration and subscription events with TikTok. Chats, prompts, media, email, and payment details are never included.
artifacts.searchArtifactsHint: Searches artifacts by filename, file type, or URL.
artifacts.searchDocumentsHint: Searches loaded documents by title, type, format, and filename.
artifacts.openSourceChatHint: Navigates to the chat where this artifact was created.
artifacts.downloadHint: Downloads this artifact to your device.
artifacts.openChatHint: Navigates to chat so you can request new generated artifacts.
